metadata: {"elabftw": {"extra_fields_groups": [{"id": 1, "name": "Equilibration"}, {"id": 2, "name": "Filtration"}, {"id": 3, "name": "Isotherm"}, {"id": 4, "name": "Incubation"}, {"id": 5, "name": "Measurement"}, {"id": 6, "name": "Wash"}]}, "extra_fields": {"Buffer": {"type": "text", "value": "Wasser", "group_id": 3, "position": 11, "description": "Name and concentration of the binding Buffer, e.g. 20 mM Tris"}, "Process ID": {"type": "text", "value": "22", "group_id": 2, "readonly": true, "required": true, "description": "Linked Process ID (do not modify)"}, "Pump Speed": {"type": "number", "unit": "%", "units": ["%"], "value": "50", "group_id": 2, "description": "Percentage of max. pump speed for filtration"}, "Replicates": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "3", "group_id": 3, "position": 10, "description": "Number of replicates per tested combination"}, "Resin Mass": {"type": "number", "unit": "mg", "units": ["mg"], "value": "250", "group_id": 3, "description": "Mass of resin in each well"}, "Ligand Name": {"type": "text", "value": "Cu-L1", "group_id": 3, "position": 0, "description": "Name of the ligand"}, "Wash Cycles": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "3", "group_id": 6, "description": "Number of wash cycles"}, "Wash Volume": {"type": "number", "unit": "µL", "units": ["µL"], "value": "500", "group_id": 6, "description": "Volume of wash solution per well"}, "Total volume": {"type": "number", "unit": "µL", "units": ["µL"], "value": "500", "group_id": 3, "description": "Total volume of sample during incubation"}, "Venting time": {"type": "number", "unit": "s", "units": ["s"], "value": "600", "group_id": 2, "description": "Time to build pressure after filtration before plate can be lifted"}, "Pump Duration": {"type": "number", "unit": "s", "units": ["s"], "value": "60", "group_id": 2, "description": "Vacuum pumping duration for filtration"}, "Wash Duration": {"type": "number", "unit": "min", "units": ["min"], "value": "2", "group_id": 6, "description": "Duration of a wash cycle"}, "Incubation Time": {"type": "number", "unit": "min", "units": ["min"], "value": "1080", "group_id": 4, "description": "Incubation time for binding step"}, "Measurement Volume": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "75", "group_id": 5, "description": "Volume per Well for Measurement"}, "Equilibration Cycles": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "0", "group_id": 1, "description": "Number of equilibration cycles"}, "Equilibration Volume": {"type": "number", "unit": "µL", "units": ["µL"], "value": "0", "group_id": 1, "description": "Buffer volume for equilibration per well"}, "Ligand concentrations": {"type": "text", "value": "20.0; 16.0; 12.0; 8.0; 4.0; 2.0; 1.0; 0.0", "group_id": 3, "position": 3, "description": "Specify the desired ligand concentrations exactly, separated by semicolon. E.g., 1.0;1.5;2.0;5.0;10.0"}, "Incubation Temperature": {"type": "number", "unit": "°C", "units": ["°C"], "value": "25", "group_id": 4, "description": "Temperature for binding step"}, "Measurement Wavelength": {"type": "number", "unit": "nm", "units": ["nm"], "value": "254", "group_id": 5, "description": "Absorption wavelength for platereader"}, "Calibration Curve Slope": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "4.0033", "group_id": 5}, "Shaker Speed Incubation": {"type": "number", "unit": "RPM", "units": ["RPM"], "value": "900", "group_id": 4, "description": "Shaking speed during incubation step (0-2000 RPM)"}, "Ligand concentration unit": {"type": "text", "value": "mM", "group_id": 3, "position": 2}, "Ligand Stock Concentration": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "20", "group_id": 3, "position": 4, "description": "Stock concentration of ligand. Must be at least 2x the max concentration for binding"}, "Calibration Curve Intercept": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "0", "group_id": 5}, "Equilibration Cycle Duration": {"type": "number", "unit": "min", "units": ["min"], "value": "0", "group_id": 1, "description": "Duration per equilibration cycle"}, "Number of ligand concentrations": {"type": "number", "unit": "", "units": [], "value": "8", "group_id": 3, "position": 1, "description": "Number of different ligand concentrations for the isotherm (max. 8)"}}}

Buffer.description: Name and concentration of the binding Buffer, e.g. 20 mM Tris

Pump Speed.description: Percentage of max. pump speed for filtration

Replicates.description: Number of replicates per tested combination

Resin Mass.description: Mass of resin in each well

Wash Volume.description: Volume of wash solution per well

Total volume.description: Total volume of sample during incubation

Venting time.description: Time to build pressure after filtration before plate can be lifted

Equilibration Volume.description: Buffer volume for equilibration per well

Ligand concentrations.description: Specify the desired ligand concentrations exactly, separated by semicolon. E.g., 1.0;1.5;2.0;5.0;10.0

Shaker Speed Incubation.description: Shaking speed during incubation step (0-2000 RPM)

Ligand Stock Concentration.description: Stock concentration of ligand. Must be at least 2x the max concentration for binding

Number of ligand concentrations.description: Number of different ligand concentrations for the isotherm (max. 8)

title: Loading Isotherm with Wash
